FHIR R4 (4.0.1) — Parent-Child Hierarchy

264 nodes · Depth-first pre-order · Triple view: organizational, inheritance table, inheritance tree

143Resources
38Datatypes
57Normative
140→ DomainResource
3→ Resource
264Total Nodes
By Module view: Resources grouped by FHIR specification layers (L1 Foundation → L6 Specialized). The Parent column shows the organizational category. The Extends column shows type inheritance.
By Category view: Resources grouped by HL7 FHIR R4 categories as shown on hl7.org/fhir/R4/resourcelist.html. Foundation (Conformance, Terminology, Security, Documents, Other) → Base (Individuals, Entities, Workflow, Management) → Clinical (Summary, Diagnostics, Medications, Care Provision) → Financial → Specialized.
By Inheritance view: FHIR type hierarchy (extends relationship). Base → Element & Resource. Element → PrimitiveType (20), DataType (30+), BackboneElement (4). Resource → DomainResource (140+), Binary, Bundle, Parameters.
🌳 Inheritance Tree: D3 node-link tree showing extends relationships. Click name to open HL7 FHIR R4 docs (new tab). Click circle to expand/collapse children. Scroll to zoom, drag to pan.
Name Parent Type Extends FMM Status Module
